name: @harness/gate-core
description: 完整 harness CLI:产出引擎(create/plan/run/fix/review)+ 门禁内核(插件化检查 + 人工决策)

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const p of ['dist/src/cli.js','dist/demo/run-demo.js']) if (fs.existsSync(p)) fs.chmodSync(p, 0o755)"
scripts.test:daytona: npm run build && RUN_DAYTONA_INTEGRATION=1 node dist/test/daytona-claude.js
scripts.test:daytona:pty: npm run build && RUN_DAYTONA_PTY_INTEGRATION=1 node dist/test/daytona-pty.js
scripts.snapshot:runtime: npm run snapshot:agent && npm run snapshot:gate
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run test
